title: L1A: Introduction; Elements of Programming
description: Introduction to CS1101S, course management, elements of programming.

title: L1B: Runology
description: First mission recap, Source in Pictures, Runology.

title: L2A: Substitution Model, Recursion
description: Substitution model (SICP 1.1.3, 1.1.5), recursion and iteration (SICP 1.2.1).

title: L2B: Orders of Growth
description: Orders of growth, time and space complexity analysis.

title: L3A: Higher-order Functions; Scope of Names
description: Nested constant declarations, recursion, higher-order functions, scope of names.

title: L3B: Curves and Sound
description: Curves and sound processing using higher-order functions.

title: L4A: Introduction to Data Abstraction
description: Data abstraction, case study with rational numbers, making lists with pairs.

title: L5A: List Processing
description: List processing operations and techniques.

title: L5B: Tree Processing and CPS
description: Tree processing and continuation-passing style (CPS).

title: L6A: Sorting and Symbolic Processing
description: Sorting algorithms and symbolic processing techniques.

title: L6B: Programming Language Processing
description: T-Diagrams, interpreters, compilers, combinations, Programming LEGO Bricks.

title: L7B: Streams I
description: Introduction to streams and lazy evaluation.

title: L8A: Mutable Data; Arrays and Loops
description: Mutable data structures, arrays, and loop constructs.

title: L8B: Environment Model
description: Environment model of evaluation for understanding scope and mutation.

title: L9A: Introduction to the CSE Machine
description: Introduction to the Control-Stash-Environment (CSE) machine.

title: L9B: The Full CSE Machine
description: Complete CSE machine with all features and evaluation rules.

title: L10A: Searching and Sorting II; Memoization
description: Advanced searching and sorting algorithms, memoization techniques.

title: L11A: Streams II
description: Advanced stream processing and applications.

title: L11B: Programming a CSE Machine I
description: Motivation and implementation of a CSE machine in Source.

title: L12A: Programming a CSE Machine II
description: CSE machine review, arrays, break statements, JavaScript-specific details, adding functions.

title: L10B: Metacircular Evaluator
description: Metacircular evaluators, calculator language, booleans, conditionals, sequences, blocks, declarations, simple functions, return statements.

title: L13A: Types, Classes, and Objects
description: Typed Source, classes and objects in programming.

title: L13B: The Last Lecture
description: Wrapping up, big ideas of CS1101S, areas of computer science, Source vs JavaScript.

title: Midterm AY2022/23 S1 Solutions
description: Midterm exam solutions for CS1101S AY2022/2023 Semester 1, covers weeks 1-6 topics.

title: Midterm AY2023/24 S1 Solutions
description: Midterm exam solutions for CS1101S AY2023/2024 Semester 1, covers weeks 1-6 topics.

title: Midterm AY2024/25 S1 Solutions
description: Midterm exam solutions for CS1101S AY2024/2025 Semester 1, covers weeks 1-6 topics.

title: S2: Source Academy Burger Joint
description: Studio on functions and conditionals: designing a point-of-sale system for a burger joint, encoding combos, biggie_size, unbiggie_size, is_biggie_size.

title: S3: Recursion; Iterative and Recursive Processes
description: Studio on substitution model and recursion: rune functions, recursive evaluation using substitution model from Lecture L2A.

title: S4: Tree Recursion
description: Studio on tree recursion: Pascal's triangle, tree-recursive processes, higher-order functions, function types and type notation.

title: S5: Box-and-Pointer Diagrams
description: Studio on data structures: drawing box-and-pointer diagrams, list and box notation, reverse function analysis, list traversal with head/tail.

title: S6: Problem Solving and List Processing
description: Studio on list processing using Source §2 LISTS functions: implementing map using accumulate, remove_duplicates using filter, coin change problem.

title: S9: Environment Model and Mutable Data
description: Studio on environment model and mutation: variable assignment with change function, d_filter using mutable pairs, environment model reasoning.

title: S10: CSE Machine
description: Studio on CSE machine and streams: CPS accumulate environment diagrams, stream operations, continuation-passing style analysis.

title: R1: Elements of Programming
description: Reflection on Source §1, declaring names, booleans, comparison operators, function declarations, conditional expressions, Source Playground.

title: R2: Recursion and Iteration
description: Reflection on Source style guide, iterative vs recursive processes, deferred operations, SICP sections 1.1 and 1.2.1.

title: R4: Data Abstraction
description: Reflection on Source §2 list functions (pair, head, tail, is_null, list, length, list_ref, append, reverse), box-and-pointer diagrams, box notation, list notation.

title: R6: Sorting
description: Reflection on sorting algorithms: insertion sort with custom comparators, ascending/descending order, reversing lists using insertion_sort_cmp.

title: R8: Mutable Data
description: Reflection on mutable data: make_withdraw function from Lecture L8A, password-protected accounts, account disabling after failed attempts.

title: Reading Assessment 1 AY2021/22 S1 Solutions
description: RA1 solutions for AY2021/2022 Semester 1. 18 MCQs in 4 sections, 45 min, closed-book with one cheat sheet. Covers weeks 1-6 topics.

title: Reading Assessment 1 AY2022/23 S1 Solutions
description: RA1 solutions for AY2022/2023 Semester 1. 19 MCQs in 4 sections, 45 min, closed-book with one cheat sheet. Covers weeks 1-6 topics.

title: Reading Assessment 1 AY2023/24 S1 Solutions
description: RA1 solutions for AY2023/2024 Semester 1. 19 MCQs, 40 min, closed-book. Covers weeks 1-6 topics.

title: Reading Assessment 1 AY2024/25 S1 Solutions
description: RA1 solutions for AY2024/2025 Semester 1. 20 MCQs, 45 min, closed-book. Covers weeks 1-6 topics.

title: Reading Assessment 1 AY2025/26 S1 Solutions
description: RA1 solutions for AY2025/2026 Semester 1. 18 MCQs, 45 min, closed-book. Covers weeks 1-6 topics.

title: Reading Assessment 2 AY2021/22 S1 Solutions
description: RA2 solutions for AY2021/2022 Semester 1. 22 MCQs in 4 sections, 45 min, closed-book with one cheat sheet. Covers weeks 7-13 topics, Source §3.

title: Reading Assessment 2 AY2022/23 S1 Solutions
description: RA2 solutions for AY2022/2023 Semester 1. 21 MCQs in 3 sections, 45 min, closed-book with one cheat sheet. Covers weeks 7-13 topics, Source §3.
